extension.news: v2.0.9-p3i.1: Skip the background fanart grabber and PIL blur while anything is playing (they ran synchronously on the service thread every ~200s and caused microstutters on constrained boxes). Gated on isPlaying so pauses/seeks cannot let it slip through and hitch playback on resume. Based on upstream 2.0.9. Upstream PR: sualfred/script.embuary.helper#73
extension.description: Helper script to provide features and functions to the Embuary skin. A full documentation can be found on GitHub: https://github.com/sualfred/script.embuary.helper/wiki
